Name: Makeni Farm Block A – Title Deed 50ha Maize Land
Description: Freehold agricultural title for Farm Block A, 50 hectares. Currently under centre-pivot maize cultivation. Lusaka Province, Makeni area. Title registered at Lands & Deeds Registry.

Name: Makeni Farm Block B – Title Deed 35ha Wheat Land
Description: Freehold agricultural title for Farm Block B, 35 hectares. Irrigated wheat production zone. Lusaka Province, Makeni area. Title registered at Lands & Deeds Registry.

Name: Makeni Farm Block C – Title Deed 40ha Soybean Land
Description: Freehold agricultural title for Farm Block C, 40 hectares. Dedicated soybean rotation block. Lusaka Province, Makeni area. Title registered at Lands & Deeds Registry.
LockedReason: Pledged as collateral – ZANACO Farm Mortgage Facility

Name: Makeni Farm Block D – Title Deed 25ha Vegetable Land
Description: Freehold agricultural title for Farm Block D, 25 hectares. Drip-irrigated vegetables (tomatoes, peppers, onions). Lusaka Province, Makeni area.

Name: Makeni Farm Block E – Title Deed 30ha Orchard Land
Description: Freehold agricultural title for Farm Block E, 30 hectares. Established citrus and banana orchard. Lusaka Province, Makeni area.

Name: John Deere 8R 370 Tractor #1 (S/N: 1RW8R370PNL803241)
Description: 2023 John Deere 8R 370 row-crop tractor, 370hp, AutoTrac GPS guidance, CommandARM cab. 4WD. Currently assigned to Block A ploughing operations.

Name: John Deere 8R 370 Tractor #2 (S/N: 1RW8R370PNL803242)
Description: 2023 John Deere 8R 370 row-crop tractor, 370hp, AutoTrac GPS guidance, CommandARM cab. 4WD. Currently assigned to Block B ploughing operations.

Name: New Holland TC5.90 Combine Harvester (S/N: ZBE209055)
Description: 2022 New Holland TC5.90 combine harvester, 5-walker straw, 20ft grain header, 2800-litre grain tank. GPS yield mapping. Used for maize and wheat harvesting across Blocks A & B.
LockedReason: Pledged as collateral – ZANACO Farm Mortgage Facility

Name: Valley Centre-Pivot Irrigation System #1 – 500m Span (Block A)
Description: Valley 8000 series centre-pivot, 500m lateral span covering 78 hectares on Block A. Electric drive, automatic GPS-guided variable rate irrigation. Installed 2022.

Name: Valley Centre-Pivot Irrigation System #2 – 500m Span (Block B)
Description: Valley 8000 series centre-pivot, 500m lateral span covering 78 hectares on Block B. Electric drive, automatic GPS-guided variable rate irrigation. Installed 2023.

Name: Amazone UX 4200 Crop Sprayer (S/N: AZ204419)
Description: 2023 Amazone UX 4200 self-propelled crop sprayer, 4200-litre tank, 36m boom, GPS section control. Used for fungicide, herbicide and insecticide applications across all blocks.

Name: Farm Steel Grain Silo #1 – 500-Tonne Capacity
Description: Brock grain silo, 500-tonne flat-bottom steel bin with aeration fans and monitoring cable. Installed 2021. Used for on-farm maize storage post-harvest.

Name: Farm Steel Grain Silo #2 – 800-Tonne Capacity
Description: Brock grain silo, 800-tonne flat-bottom steel bin with aeration fans and temperature monitoring. Installed 2022. Primary storage for wheat and soybeans.

Name: Grundfos SP46-6 Borehole Pump System – 15kW Solar
Description: Solar-powered Grundfos SP46-6 submersible borehole pump, 15kW PV array, Grundfos CU 352 controller. Rated 45 m³/hr at 80m head. Primary water supply for Block D drip irrigation.

Name: Block A – 50ha Standing White Maize Crop (2024/25 Season)
Description: 50 hectares of PHB 30D13 hybrid white maize, currently at VT/R1 growth stage. Expected yield: 9 t/ha. Planted November 2024. Insured under Zambia Agri-Insurance.

Name: Block B – 35ha Standing Wheat Crop (2024/25 Season)
Description: 35 hectares of Durum wheat variety Cham 6, currently at flag-leaf stage under centre-pivot irrigation. Expected yield: 5 t/ha. Planted May 2025.

Name: Block C – 40ha Standing Soybean Crop (2024/25 Season)
Description: 40 hectares of Naseco Nasima soybean variety at R3 pod-fill stage. Expected yield: 2.5 t/ha. Planted December 2024 under centre-pivot. Contracted to COMACO for direct purchase.

Name: Block D – 25ha Mixed Vegetable Standing Crop (Tomatoes & Peppers)
Description: 25 hectares of mixed vegetables: 15ha hybrid tomatoes (SC 2121), 10ha sweet peppers. Drip-irrigated. Contracted to Shoprite Zambia Distribution Centre. Current harvest cycle.

Name: Block E – 20ha Valencia Orange Orchard (7-year trees)
Description: Established 20-hectare Valencia orange orchard on Block E. 2,400 trees planted 2018, 7-year-old bearing trees. Average yield 40t/ha. Drip-irrigated, nett-fenced. Supplied to Export Trading Company.

Name: Block E – 5ha Lemon Orchard (Eureka Variety, 5-year trees)
Description: 5-hectare Eureka lemon orchard, 750 trees planted 2020, currently in full production. Microjet irrigated, trellised. Supplied fresh to Lusaka wholesale market and for juice extraction.

Name: Block E – 5ha Cavendish Banana Plantation (3-year stand)
Description: 5-hectare Cavendish banana plantation, 1,250 plants per hectare. Ratoon cycle commenced 2022. Drip-irrigated with fertigation system. 40 tonnes/ha expected yield. Supplied to Game Lusaka.

Name: Kafue River Water Abstraction License – 500,000 m³/annum
Description: Water abstraction license issued by WARMA (Water Resources Management Authority) Zambia. Permit No. WARMA/WA/LSK/0412. Authorized annual abstraction: 500,000 m³ from Kafue River tributary for irrigation.

Name: Groundwater Borehole License – 200,000 m³/annum
Description: Groundwater extraction license issued by WARMA Zambia. Permit No. WARMA/GW/LSK/0189. Authorized annual extraction: 200,000 m³ from licensed borehole for supplementary irrigation on Block D.

Name: Makeni Farm Apiary – 80-Hive Operation (European Honey Bee)
Description: 80 Langstroth Hive apiary operation using Apis mellifera scutellata. Hives positioned along orchard perimeter for pollination services and honey production. 3.2 tonnes annual honey yield. Registered with ZICM.

Name: John Deere 5125R Utility Tractor with Front Loader (S/N: 1PY5125RPNN100872)
Description: 2024 John Deere 5125R utility tractor, 125hp, 4WD, with 553K front loader and 2.2m bucket. Used for silage, manure spreading and yard operations. Cab with air conditioning.
